author: Lucky AI Contributors
name: lucky-ai
short: AI-powered roasts, TLDRs, message analysis, and debate judge for Discord
description: Full-featured Discord AI cog that syncs messages to SQLite and delivers AI-powered roasts, TLDR summaries, greentext recaps, chat Q&A, debate judging, hot takes, and message analysis. Supports 7 AI providers (NVIDIA, Groq, OpenAI, Moonshot, DeepSeek, Z-AI, OpenRouter) with automatic fallback. Interactive settings UI, per-guild configuration, cooldowns, opt-out, and blacklist support.
install_msg: Thank you for installing Lucky AI! Run `[p]setup` or `/setup` to launch the interactive setup wizard that will walk you through configuring API keys and testing endpoints step by step.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user messages for roasting, Q&A, and analysis purposes. Users can opt out via the /optout command. Stored data includes message content, author ID, and timestamps for channels explicitly configured by server admins.
